tEn: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
tZh: Flamingo：一种用于少样本学习的视觉语言模型
sEn: Flamingo achieves state-of-the-art few-shot learning on diverse visual tasks by bridging pretrained vision and language models.
sZh: Flamingo通过桥接预训练的视觉和语言模型，在多种视觉任务上实现了少样本学习的最优性能。
absEn: Building models that can be rapidly adapted to novel tasks using only a handful of annotated examples is an open challenge for multimodal machine learning research. We introduce Flamingo, a family of Visual Language Models (VLM) with this ability. We propose key architectural innovations to: (i) bridge powerful pretrained vision-only and language-only models, (ii) handle sequences of arbitrarily interleaved visual and textual data, and (iii) seamlessly ingest images or videos as inputs. Thanks to their flexibility, Flamingo models can be trained on large-scale multimodal web corpora containing arbitrarily interleaved text and images, which is key to endow them with in-context few-shot learning capabilities. We perform a thorough evaluation of our models, exploring and measuring their ability to rapidly adapt to a variety of image and video tasks. These include open-ended tasks such as visual question-answering, where the model is prompted with a question which it has to answer; captioning tasks, which evaluate the ability to describe a scene or an event; and close-ended tasks such as multiple-choice visual question-answering. For tasks lying anywhere on this spectrum, a single Flamingo model can achieve a new state of the art with few-shot learning, simply by prompting the model with task-specific examples. On numerous benchmarks, Flamingo outperforms models fine-tuned on thousands of times more task-specific data.
absZh: 构建能够仅使用少量标注示例快速适应新任务的模型是多模态机器学习研究的一个开放挑战。我们引入了Flamingo，一系列具有这种能力的视觉语言模型（VLM）。我们提出了关键架构创新，以：（i）桥接强大的预训练纯视觉和纯语言模型，（ii）处理任意交错视觉和文本数据的序列，以及（iii）无缝地将图像或视频作为输入。得益于其灵活性，Flamingo模型可以在包含任意交错文本和图像的大规模多模态网络语料库上进行训练，这是赋予它们上下文少样本学习能力的关键。我们对模型进行了全面评估，探索并衡量了它们快速适应各种图像和视频任务的能力。这些任务包括开放式任务，如视觉问答，其中模型被提示一个问题并需要回答；字幕任务，评估描述场景或事件的能力；以及封闭式任务，如多项选择视觉问答。对于这一范围内的任何任务，单个Flamingo模型可以通过简单地用任务特定示例提示模型，在少样本学习中达到新的最优水平。在众多基准测试中，Flamingo优于在数千倍更多任务特定数据上微调的模型。

contrib.en: Introduces Flamingo, a family of Visual Language Models for few-shot learning on multimodal tasks.
contrib.zh: 提出Flamingo系列视觉语言模型，用于多模态任务的少样本学习。

contrib.en: Proposes architectural innovations: bridging frozen vision and language models, handling interleaved data, and using a Perceiver Resampler.
contrib.zh: 提出架构创新：桥接冻结的视觉和语言模型、处理交错数据、使用感知器重采样器。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art few-shot performance on 16 multimodal benchmarks, often surpassing fine-tuned models.
contrib.zh: 在16个多模态基准上取得少样本学习最优性能，常超越微调模型。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effective in-context learning for open-ended tasks like captioning and visual question-answering.
contrib.zh: 展示了在开放任务（如描述和视觉问答）上的有效上下文学习。

contrib.en: Shows that training on interleaved web data is crucial for few-shot capabilities.
contrib.zh: 表明在交错网络数据上训练对少样本能力至关重要。

contrib.en: Scales model size and number of shots to improve performance, similar to GPT-3.
contrib.zh: 扩展模型规模和样本数量以提升性能，类似GPT-3。

limits.en: Inherits weaknesses from pretrained LMs, including hallucinations and poor generalization to long sequences.
limits.zh: 继承预训练语言模型的弱点，包括幻觉和对长序列泛化差。

limits.en: Classification performance lags behind contrastive models like CLIP.
limits.zh: 分类性能落后于对比模型（如CLIP）。

limits.en: In-context learning is sensitive to demonstration selection and scales poorly with many shots.
limits.zh: 上下文学习对示例选择敏感，且随样本数量增多扩展性差。

limits.en: Training requires large-scale web data, which may contain biases and toxic content.
limits.zh: 训练需要大规模网络数据，可能包含偏见和有害内容。

limits.en: Freezing the language model prevents catastrophic forgetting but limits adaptation.
limits.zh: 冻结语言模型可防止灾难性遗忘，但限制了适应性。

items.en: Building models that can be rapidly adapted to novel tasks using only a handful of annotated examples is an open challenge for multimodal machine learning research. We introduce Flamingo, a family of Visual Language Models (VLM) with this ability. We propose key architectural innovations to: (i) bridge powerful pretrained vision-only and language-only models, (ii) handle sequences of arbitrarily interleaved visual and textual data, and (iii) seamlessly ingest images or videos as inputs. Thanks to their flexibility, Flamingo models can be trained on large-scale multimodal web corpora containing arbitrarily interleaved text and images, which is key to endow them with in-context few-shot learning capabilities. We perform a thorough evaluation of our models, exploring and measuring their ability to rapidly adapt to a variety of image and video tasks. These include open-ended tasks such as visual question-answering, where the model is prompted with a question which it has to answer; captioning tasks, which evaluate the ability to describe a scene or an event; and close-ended tasks such as multiple-choice visual question-answering. For tasks lying anywhere on this spectrum, a single Flamingo model can achieve a new state of the art with few-shot learning, simply by prompting the model with task-specific examples. On numerous benchmarks, Flamingo outperforms models fine-tuned on thousands of times more task-specific data.
items.zh: 构建能够仅使用少量标注示例快速适应新任务的模型，是多模态机器学习研究的一个开放挑战。我们提出了 Flamingo，一个具有这种能力的视觉语言模型（VLM）家族。我们提出了关键的架构创新，以：（i）桥接强大的预训练纯视觉和纯语言模型，（ii）处理任意交错排列的视觉和文本数据序列，以及（iii）无缝地以图像或视频作为输入。得益于其灵活性，Flamingo 模型可以在包含任意交错文本和图像的大规模多模态网络语料库上进行训练，这是赋予它们上下文少样本学习能力的关键。我们对模型进行了全面评估，探索并衡量它们快速适应各种图像和视频任务的能力。这些任务包括开放式任务，如视觉问答，其中模型被提示一个问题并需要回答；描述任务，评估描述场景或事件的能力；以及封闭式任务，如多项选择视觉问答。对于这个范围内的任何任务，单个 Flamingo 模型可以通过少样本学习达到新的最先进水平，只需用特定任务的示例提示模型。在众多基准测试中，Flamingo 的表现优于在数千倍更多任务特定数据上微调的模型。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Selected examples of inputs and outputs obtained from Flamingo-80B. Flamingo can rapidly adapt to various image/video understanding tasks with few-shot prompting (top). Out of the box, Flamingo is also capable of multi-image visual dialogue (bottom). More examples in Appendix C.
items.capZh: 图 1：从 Flamingo-80B 获得的输入和输出示例。Flamingo 可以通过少样本提示快速适应各种图像/视频理解任务（顶部）。开箱即用，Flamingo 还能够进行多图像视觉对话（底部）。更多示例见附录 C。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Flamingo results overview. Left: Our largest model, dubbed Flamingo, outperforms state-of-the-art fine-tuned models on 6 of the 16 tasks we consider with no fine-tuning. For the 9 tasks with published few-shot results, Flamingo sets the new few-shot state of the art. Note: We omit RareAct, our 16th benchmark, as it is a zero-shot benchmark with no available fine-tuned results to compare to. Right: Flamingo performance improves with model size and number of shots.
items.capZh: 图 2：Flamingo 结果概览。左图：我们最大的模型 Flamingo 在 16 个任务中的 6 个上，无需微调即超越了最先进的微调模型。对于 9 个有已发表少样本结果的任务，Flamingo 设立了新的少样本最先进水平。注意：我们省略了第 16 个基准 RareAct，因为它是一个零样本基准，没有可比较的微调结果。右图：Flamingo 的性能随模型大小和样本数量提升。

items.en: One key aspect of intelligence is the ability to quickly learn to perform a new task given a short instruction [33, 70]. While initial progress has been made towards a similar capability in computer vision, the most widely used paradigm still consists of first pretraining on a large amount of supervised data, before fine-tuning the model on the task of interest [66, 118, 143]. However, successful fine-tuning often requires many thousands of annotated data points. In addition, it often requires careful per-task hyperparameter tuning and is also resource intensive. Recently, multimodal vision-language models trained with a contrastive objective [50, 85] have enabled zero-shot adaptation to novel tasks, without the need for fine-tuning. However, because these models simply provide a similarity score between a text and an image, they can only address limited use cases such as classification, where a finite set of outcomes is provided beforehand. They crucially lack the ability to generate language, which makes them less suitable to more open-ended tasks such as captioning or visual question-answering. Others have explored visually-conditioned language generation [124, 114, 17, 119, 132] but have not yet shown good performance in low-data regimes.
items.zh: 智能的一个关键方面是能够根据简短指令快速学习执行新任务 [33, 70]。尽管在计算机视觉中已经朝着类似能力取得了初步进展，但最广泛使用的范式仍然是在大量监督数据上预训练，然后在目标任务上微调模型 [66, 118, 143]。然而，成功的微调通常需要成千上万的标注数据点。此外，它通常需要仔细的逐任务超参数调整，并且资源密集。最近，使用对比目标训练的多模态视觉语言模型 [50, 85] 实现了对新任务的零样本适应，无需微调。然而，由于这些模型仅提供文本和图像之间的相似度分数，它们只能处理有限的使用场景，如分类，其中预先提供了有限的结果集。它们关键地缺乏生成语言的能力，这使得它们不太适合更开放式的任务，如描述或视觉问答。其他研究探索了视觉条件语言生成 [124, 114, 17, 119, 132]，但尚未在低数据场景中表现出良好性能。

items.en: We introduce Flamingo, a Visual Language Model (VLM) that sets a new state of the art in few-shot learning on a wide range of open-ended vision and language tasks, simply by being prompted with a few input/output examples, as illustrated in Figure 1. Of the 16 tasks we consider, Flamingo also surpasses the fine-tuned state of the art on 6 tasks, despite using orders of magnitude less task-specific training data (see Figure 2). To achieve this, Flamingo takes inspiration from recent work on large language models (LMs) which are good few-shot learners [11, 86, 42, 18]. A single large LM can achieve strong performance on many tasks using only its text interface: a few examples of a task are provided to the model as a prompt, along with a query input, and the model generates a continuation to produce a predicted output for that query. We show that the same can be done for image and video understanding tasks such as classification, captioning, or question-answering: these can be cast as text prediction problems with visual input conditioning. The difference from a LM is that the model must be able to ingest a multimodal prompt containing images and/or videos interleaved with text. Flamingo models have this capability—they are visually-conditioned autoregressive text generation models able to ingest a sequence of text tokens interleaved with images and/or videos, and produce text as output. Flamingo models leverage two complementary pre-trained and frozen models: a vision model which can “perceive” visual scenes and a large LM which performs a basic form of reasoning. Novel architecture components are added in between these models to connect them in a way that preserves the knowledge they have accumulated during computationally intensive pre-training. Flamingo models are also able to ingest high-resolution images or videos thanks to a Perceiver-based [48] architecture that can produce a small fixed number of visual tokens per image/video, given a large and variable number of visual input features.
items.zh: 我们提出了 Flamingo，一种视觉语言模型（VLM），它在广泛的开放式视觉和语言任务上通过少样本学习设立了新的最先进水平，只需通过几个输入/输出示例进行提示，如图 1 所示。在我们考虑的 16 个任务中，Flamingo 在 6 个任务上也超越了微调的最先进水平，尽管使用的任务特定训练数据数量级更少（见图 2）。为了实现这一点，Flamingo 借鉴了最近关于大型语言模型（LM）的工作，这些模型是良好的少样本学习者 [11, 86, 42, 18]。单个大型 LM 可以仅使用其文本接口在许多任务上实现强性能：将任务的几个示例作为提示提供给模型，连同查询输入，模型生成延续以产生该查询的预测输出。我们表明，对于图像和视频理解任务，如分类、描述或问答，也可以这样做：这些任务可以转化为带有视觉输入条件的文本预测问题。与 LM 的不同之处在于，模型必须能够摄取包含图像和/或视频与文本交错的多模态提示。Flamingo 模型具有这种能力——它们是视觉条件的自回归文本生成模型，能够摄取文本令牌与图像和/或视频交错的序列，并生成文本作为输出。Flamingo 模型利用两个互补的预训练和冻结模型：一个能够“感知”视觉场景的视觉模型和一个执行基本形式推理的大型 LM。在这些模型之间添加了新颖的架构组件，以连接它们，同时保留它们在计算密集型预训练期间积累的知识。Flamingo 模型还能够摄取高分辨率图像或视频，这得益于基于 Perceiver [48] 的架构，该架构可以在给定大量且可变的视觉输入特征的情况下，为每个图像/视频生成少量固定数量的视觉令牌。

items.en: A crucial aspect for the performance of large LMs is that they are trained on a large amount of text data. This training provides general-purpose generation capabilities that allows these LMs to perform well when prompted with task examples. Similarly, we demonstrate that the way we train the Flamingo models is crucial for their final performance. They are trained on a carefully chosen
items.zh: 大型 LM 性能的一个关键方面是它们在大量文本数据上训练。这种训练提供了通用生成能力，使得这些 LM 在提示任务示例时表现良好。类似地，我们证明了训练 Flamingo 模型的方式对其最终性能至关重要。它们在精心选择的

items.en: mixture of complementary large-scale multimodal data coming only from the web, without using any data annotated for machine learning purposes. After this training, a Flamingo model can be directly adapted to vision tasks via simple few-shot learning without any task-specific tuning.
items.zh: 互补的大规模多模态网络数据混合体上进行训练，而不使用任何为机器学习目的标注的数据。经过这种训练后，Flamingo 模型可以通过简单的少样本学习直接适应视觉任务，无需任何任务特定的调整。

items.en: Contributions. In summary, our contributions are the following: (i) We introduce the Flamingo family of VLMs which can perform various multimodal tasks (such as captioning, visual dialogue, or visual question-answering) from only a few input/output examples. Thanks to architectural innovations, the Flamingo models can efficiently accept arbitrarily interleaved visual data and text as input and generate text in an open-ended manner. (ii) We quantitatively evaluate how Flamingo models can be adapted to various tasks via few-shot learning. We notably reserve a large set of held-out benchmarks which have not been used for validation of any design decisions or hyperparameters of the approach. We use these to estimate unbiased few-shot performance. (iii) Flamingo sets a new state of the art in few-shot learning on a wide array of 16 multimodal language and image/video understanding tasks. On 6 of these 16 tasks, Flamingo also outperforms the fine-tuned state of the art despite using only 32 task-specific examples, around 1000 times less task-specific training data than the current state of the art. With a larger annotation budget, Flamingo can also be effectively fine-tuned to set a new state of the art on five additional challenging benchmarks: VQAv2, VATEX, VizWiz, MSRVTTQA, and HatefulMemes.
items.zh: 贡献。总结来说，我们的贡献如下：（i）我们提出了 Flamingo VLM 家族，它可以从仅几个输入/输出示例执行各种多模态任务（如描述、视觉对话或视觉问答）。得益于架构创新，Flamingo 模型可以高效地接受任意交错的视觉数据和文本作为输入，并以开放式方式生成文本。（ii）我们定量评估了 Flamingo 模型如何通过少样本学习适应各种任务。我们特别保留了一大组未用于验证任何设计决策或超参数的保留基准。我们使用这些来估计无偏的少样本性能。（iii）Flamingo 在广泛的 16 个多模态语言和图像/视频理解任务上设立了少样本学习的新最先进水平。在这 16 个任务中的 6 个上，Flamingo 也超越了微调的最先进水平，尽管仅使用了 32 个任务特定示例，比当前最先进水平少约 1000 倍的任务特定训练数据。使用更大的标注预算，Flamingo 也可以有效微调，在另外五个具有挑战性的基准上设立新的最先进水平：VQAv2、VATEX、VizWiz、MSRVTTQA 和 HatefulMemes。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Flamingo architecture overview. Flamingo is a family of visual language models (VLMs) that take as input visual data interleaved with text and produce free-form text as output.
items.capZh: 图 3：Flamingo 架构概览。Flamingo 是一个视觉语言模型（VLM）家族，它接受视觉数据与文本交错作为输入，并输出自由形式的文本。

items.en: This section describes Flamingo: a visual language model that accepts text interleaved with images/videos as input and outputs free-form text. The key architectural components shown in Figure 3 are chosen to leverage pretrained vision and language models and bridge them effectively. First, the Perceiver Resampler (Section 2.1) receives spatio-temporal features from the Vision Encoder (obtained from either an image or a video) and outputs a fixed number of visual tokens. Second, these visual tokens are used to condition the frozen LM using freshly initialised cross-attention layers (Section 2.2) that are interleaved between the pretrained LM layers. These new layers offer an expressive way for the LM to incorporate visual information for the next-token prediction task. Flamingo models the likelihood of text y𝑦y conditioned on interleaved images and videos x𝑥x as follows:
items.zh: 本节描述 Flamingo：一个接受文本与图像/视频交错作为输入并输出自由形式文本的视觉语言模型。图 3 中所示的关键架构组件被选择用于利用预训练的视觉和语言模型并有效桥接它们。首先，Perceiver 重采样器（第 2.1 节）接收来自视觉编码器的时空特征（从图像或视频获得），并输出固定数量的视觉令牌。其次，这些视觉令牌用于使用新初始化的交叉注意力层（第 2.2 节）条件化冻结的 LM，这些层交错在预训练的 LM 层之间。这些新层为 LM 提供了一种表达性的方式，用于将视觉信息纳入下一个词预测任务。Flamingo 对文本 y 在交错图像和视频 x 条件下的似然建模如下：

items.en: where yℓsubscript𝑦ℓy_{\ell} is the ℓℓ\ell-th language token of the input text, y<ℓsubscript𝑦absentℓy_{<\ell} is the set of preceding tokens, x≤ℓsubscript𝑥absentℓx_{\leq\ell} is the set of images/videos preceding token yℓsubscript𝑦ℓy_{\ell} in the interleaved sequence and p𝑝p is parametrized by a Flamingo model. The ability to handle interleaved text and visual sequences (Section 2.3) makes it natural to use Flamingo models for in-context few-shot learning, analogously to GPT-3 with few-shot text prompting. The model is trained on a diverse mixture of datasets as described in Section 2.4.
items.zh: 其中 y_ℓ 是输入文本的第 ℓ 个语言令牌，y_<ℓ 是前面的令牌集，x_≤ℓ 是交错序列中令牌 y_ℓ 之前的图像/视频集，p 由 Flamingo 模型参数化。处理交错文本和视觉序列的能力（第 2.3 节）使得 Flamingo 模型自然适用于上下文少样本学习，类似于 GPT-3 的少样本文本提示。模型按照第 2.4 节所述在多样化的数据集混合体上进行训练。

full.sec: 2.1 Visual processing and the Perceiver Resampler
full.secZh: 2.1 视觉处理与感知器重采样器

items.en: Vision Encoder: from pixels to features. Our vision encoder is a pretrained and frozen Normalizer-Free ResNet (NFNet) [10] – we use the F6 model. We pretrain the vision encoder using a contrastive objective on our datasets of image and text pairs, using the two-term contrastive loss from Radford et al. [85]. We use the output of the final stage, a 2D spatial grid of features that is flattened to a 1D sequence. For video inputs, frames are sampled at 1 FPS and encoded independently to obtain a 3D spatio-temporal grid of features to which learned temporal embeddings are added. Features are then flattened to 1D before being fed to the Perceiver Resampler. More details on the contrastive model training and performance are given in Appendix B.1.3 and Appendix B.3.2, respectively.
items.zh: 视觉编码器：从像素到特征。我们的视觉编码器是一个预训练且冻结的无归一化 ResNet（NFNet）[10]——我们使用 F6 模型。我们使用 Radford 等人 [85] 的两项对比损失，在我们的图像和文本对数据集上使用对比目标预训练视觉编码器。我们使用最终阶段的输出，一个 2D 空间特征网格，展平为 1D 序列。对于视频输入，帧以 1 FPS 采样并独立编码，以获得 3D 时空特征网格，并添加学习到的时间嵌入。特征然后展平为 1D，然后馈送到 Perceiver 重采样器。对比模型训练和性能的更多细节分别在附录 B.1.3 和附录 B.3.2 中给出。

items.en: Perceiver Resampler: from varying-size large feature maps to few visual tokens. This module connects the vision encoder to the frozen language model as shown in Figure 3. It takes as input a variable number of image or video features from the vision encoder and produces a fixed number of visual outputs (64), reducing the computational complexity of the vision-text cross-attention. Similar to Perceiver [48] and DETR [13], we learn a predefined number of latent input queries which are fed to a Transformer and cross-attend to the visual features. We show in our ablation studies (Section 3.3) that using such a vision-language resampler module outperforms a plain Transformer and an MLP. We provide an illustration, more architectural details, and pseudo-code in Appendix A.1.1.
items.zh: Perceiver 重采样器：从可变大小的大特征图到少量视觉令牌。该模块连接视觉编码器和冻结的语言模型，如图 3 所示。它接收来自视觉编码器的可变数量的图像或视频特征，并产生固定数量的视觉输出（64），降低了视觉-文本交叉注意力的计算复杂度。类似于 Perceiver [48] 和 DETR [13]，我们学习预定义数量的潜在输入查询，这些查询被馈送到 Transformer 并与视觉特征进行交叉注意力。我们在消融研究（第 3.3 节）中表明，使用这样的视觉-语言重采样器模块优于普通 Transformer 和 MLP。我们在附录 A.1.1 中提供了插图、更多架构细节和伪代码。

full.sec: 2.2 Conditioning frozen language models on visual representations
full.secZh: 2.2 基于视觉表示的条件化冻结语言模型

items.en: Text generation is performed by a Transformer decoder, conditioned on the visual representations produced by the Perceiver Resampler. We interleave pretrained and frozen text-only LM blocks with blocks trained from scratch that cross-attend to the visual output from the Perceiver Resampler.
items.zh: 文本生成由 Transformer 解码器执行，以 Perceiver 重采样器产生的视觉表示为条件。我们将预训练且冻结的纯文本 LM 块与从头训练的块交错，这些块与 Perceiver 重采样器的视觉输出进行交叉注意力。

items.capEn: Figure 4: gated xattn-dense layers. To condition the LM on visual inputs, we insert new cross-attention layers between existing pretrained and frozen LM layers. The keys and values in these layers are obtained from the vision features while the queries are derived from the language inputs. They are followed by dense feed-forward layers. These layers are gated so that the LM is kept intact at initialization for improved stability and performance.
items.capZh: 图 4：门控 xattn-dense 层。为了以视觉输入条件化 LM，我们在现有的预训练且冻结的 LM 层之间插入新的交叉注意力层。这些层中的键和值来自视觉特征，而查询来自语言输入。它们后面跟着密集前馈层。这些层是门控的，以便 LM 在初始化时保持完整，以提高稳定性和性能。

items.en: Interleaving new gated xattn-dense layers within a frozen pretrained LM. We freeze the pretrained LM blocks, and insert gated cross-attention dense blocks (Figure 4) between the original layers, trained from scratch. To ensure that at initialization, the conditioned model yields the same results as the original language model, we use a tanh\tanh-gating mechanism [41]. This multiplies the output of a newly added layer by tanh⁡(α)𝛼\tanh(\alpha) before adding it to the input representation from the residual connection, where α𝛼\alpha is a layer-specific learnable scalar initialized to 00 [4]. Thus, at initialization, the model output matches that of the pretrained LM, improving training stability and final performance. In our ablation studies (Section 3.3), we compare the proposed gated xattn-dense layers against recent alternatives [22, 68] and explore the effect of how frequently these additional layers are inserted to trade off between efficiency and expressivity. See Appendix A.1.2 for more details.
items.zh: 在冻结的预训练 LM 内交错新的门控 xattn-dense 层。我们冻结预训练的 LM 块，并在原始层之间插入门控交叉注意力密集块（图 4），从头训练。为了确保在初始化时，条件化模型产生与原始语言模型相同的结果，我们使用 tanh 门控机制 [41]。它将新添加层的输出乘以 tanh(α) 后再通过残差连接加到输入表示上，其中 α 是层特定的可学习标量，初始化为 0 [4]。因此，在初始化时，模型输出与预训练 LM 匹配，提高了训练稳定性和最终性能。在我们的消融研究（第 3.3 节）中，我们将提出的门控 xattn-dense 层与最近的替代方案 [22, 68] 进行比较，并探索这些额外层插入频率的影响，以在效率和表达性之间进行权衡。更多细节见附录 A.1.2。

items.en: Varying model sizes. We perform experiments across three models sizes, building on the 1.4B, 7B, and 70B parameter Chinchilla models [42]; calling them respectively Flamingo-3B, Flamingo-9B and Flamingo-80B. For brevity, we refer to the last as Flamingo throughout the paper. While increasing the parameter count of the frozen LM and the trainable vision-text gated xattn-dense modules, we maintain a fixed-size frozen vision encoder and trainable Perceiver Resampler across the different models (small relative to the full model size). See Appendix B.1.1 for further details.
items.zh: 不同模型大小。我们在三种模型大小上进行实验，基于 1.4B、7B 和 70B 参数的 Chinchilla 模型 [42]；分别称为 Flamingo-3B、Flamingo-9B 和 Flamingo-80B。为简洁起见，我们在本文中称最后一个为 Flamingo。在增加冻结 LM 和可训练视觉-文本门控 xattn-dense 模块的参数数量的同时，我们在不同模型中保持固定大小的冻结视觉编码器和可训练 Perceiver 重采样器（相对于完整模型大小较小）。更多细节见附录 B.1.1。

full.sec: 2.3 Multi-visual input support: per-image/video attention masking
full.secZh: 2.3 多视觉输入支持：每图像/视频注意力掩码

items.en: The image-causal modelling introduced in Equation (1) is obtained by masking the full text-to-image cross-attention matrix, limiting which visual tokens the model sees at each text token. At a given text token, the model attends to the visual tokens of the image that appeared just before it in the interleaved sequence, rather than to all previous images (formalized and illustrated in Appendix A.1.3). Though the model only directly attends to a single image at a time, the dependency on all previous images remains via self-attention in the LM. This single-image cross-attention scheme importantly allows the model to seamlessly generalise to any number of visual inputs, regardless of how many are used during training. In particular, we use only up to 5 images per sequence when training on our interleaved datasets, yet our model is able to benefit from sequences of up to 32 pairs (or “shots”) of images/videos and corresponding texts during evaluation. We show in Section 3.3 that this scheme is more effective than allowing the model to cross-attend to all previous images directly.
items.zh: 公式 (1) 中引入的图像因果建模通过掩蔽完整的文本到图像交叉注意力矩阵来实现，限制了模型在每个文本令牌处看到的视觉令牌。在给定的文本令牌处，模型只关注交错序列中刚好出现在它之前的图像的视觉令牌，而不是所有之前的图像（在附录 A.1.3 中形式化和说明）。尽管模型一次只直接关注单个图像，但通过 LM 中的自注意力，对所有之前图像的依赖仍然存在。这种单图像交叉注意力方案重要地允许模型无缝地泛化到任意数量的视觉输入，无论训练中使用了多少。特别地，在交错数据集上训练时，我们每个序列最多使用 5 张图像，但我们的模型在评估时能够受益于多达 32 对（或“样本”）图像/视频和对应文本的序列。我们在第 3.3 节中表明，这种方案比允许模型直接交叉关注所有之前的图像更有效。

full.sec: 2.4 Training on a mixture of vision and language datasets
full.secZh: 2.4 在视觉与语言数据集混合上训练

items.en: We train the Flamingo models on a mixture of three kinds of datasets, all scraped from the web: an interleaved image and text dataset derived from webpages, image-text pairs, and video-text pairs.
items.zh: 我们在三种数据集的混合体上训练 Flamingo 模型，所有数据均从网络抓取：从网页派生的交错图像和文本数据集、图像-文本对以及视频-文本对。

items.en: M3W: Interleaved image and text dataset. The few-shot capabilities of Flamingo models rely on training on interleaved text and image data. For this purpose, we collect the MultiModal MassiveWeb (M3W) dataset. We extract both text and images from the HTML of approximately 43 million webpages, determining the positions of images relative to the text based on the relative positions of the text and image elements in the Document Object Model (DOM). An example is then constructed by inserting <image> tags in plain text at the locations of the images on the page, and inserting a special <EOC> (end of chunk) token (added to the vocabulary and learnt) prior to any image and at the end of the document. From each document, we sample a random subsequence of L=256𝐿256L=256 tokens and take up to the first N=5𝑁5N=5 images included in the sampled sequence. Further images are discarded in order to save compute. More details are provided in Appendix A.3.
items.zh: M3W：交错图像和文本数据集。Flamingo 模型的少样本能力依赖于在交错文本和图像数据上训练。为此，我们收集了多模态大规模网络（M3W）数据集。我们从大约 4300 万个网页的 HTML 中提取文本和图像，根据文档对象模型（DOM）中文本和图像元素的相对位置确定图像相对于文本的位置。然后通过将 <image> 标签插入到页面中图像位置的纯文本中，并在任何图像之前和文档末尾插入特殊的 <EOC>（块结束）令牌（添加到词汇表中并学习）来构建示例。从每个文档中，我们随机采样一个长度为 L=256 令牌的子序列，并取采样序列中包含的前 N=5 张图像。为了节省算力，丢弃更多图像。更多细节见附录 A.3。

items.en: Pairs of image/video and text. For our image and text pairs we first leverage the ALIGN [50] dataset, composed of 1.8 billion images paired with alt-text. To complement this dataset, we collect our own dataset of image and text pairs targeting better quality and longer descriptions: LTIP (Long Text & Image Pairs) which consists of 312 million image and text pairs. We also collect a similar dataset but with videos instead of still images: VTP (Video & Text Pairs) consists of 27 million short videos (approximately 22 seconds on average) paired with sentence descriptions. We align the syntax of paired datasets with the syntax of M3W by prepending <image> and appending <EOC> to each training caption (see Appendix A.3.3 for details).
items.zh: 图像/视频与文本对。对于图像与文本对，我们首先利用ALIGN [50]数据集，该数据集包含18亿张图像及其替代文本。为补充该数据集，我们自行收集了质量更高、描述更长的图像与文本对数据集：LTIP（长文本与图像对），包含3.12亿个图像与文本对。我们还收集了类似的数据集，但使用视频而非静态图像：VTP（视频与文本对）包含2700万个短视频（平均时长约22秒）及其句子描述。我们通过在每个训练标题前添加<image>、后接<EOC>来统一配对数据集与M3W的语法（详见附录A.3.3）。

items.en: Multi-objective training and optimisation strategy. We train our models by minimizing a weighted sum of per-dataset expected negative log-likelihoods of text, given the visual inputs:
items.zh: 多目标训练与优化策略。我们通过最小化各数据集在给定视觉输入下文本的期望负对数似然的加权和来训练模型：

items.en: where 𝒟msubscript𝒟𝑚\mathcal{D}_{m} and λmsubscript𝜆𝑚\lambda_{m} are the m𝑚m-th dataset and its weighting, respectively. Tuning the per-dataset weights λmsubscript𝜆𝑚\lambda_{m} is key to performance. We accumulate gradients over all datasets, which we found outperforms a “round-robin” approach [17]. We provide further training details and ablations in Appendix B.1.2.
items.zh: 其中D_m和λ_m分别是第m个数据集及其权重。调整各数据集权重λ_m对性能至关重要。我们累积所有数据集的梯度，发现这优于“轮询”方法[17]。更多训练细节和消融实验见附录B.1.2。

full.sec: 2.5 Task adaptation with few-shot in-context learning
full.secZh: 2.5 基于少样本上下文学习的任务适应

items.en: Once Flamingo is trained, we use it to tackle a visual task by conditioning it on a multimodal interleaved prompt. We evaluate the ability of our models to rapidly adapt to new tasks using in-context learning, analogously to GPT-3 [11], by interleaving support example pairs in the form of (i​m​a​g​e,t​e​x​t)𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑔𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑥𝑡(image,text) or (v​i​d​e​o,t​e​x​t)𝑣𝑖𝑑𝑒𝑜𝑡𝑒𝑥𝑡(video,text), followed by the query visual input, to build a prompt (details in Appendix A.2). We perform open-ended evaluations using beam search for decoding, and close-ended evaluations using our model’s log-likelihood to score each possible answer. We explore zero-shot generalization by prompting the model with two text-only examples from the task, with no corresponding images. Evaluation hyperparameters and additional details are given in Appendix B.1.5.
items.zh: 训练完成后，我们通过将Flamingo置于多模态交错提示下，用于处理视觉任务。我们评估模型通过上下文学习快速适应新任务的能力，类似于GPT-3 [11]，方法是在提示中交错插入支持样本对，形式为(image,text)或(video,text)，后接查询视觉输入（详见附录A.2）。我们使用束搜索进行解码以进行开放式评估，并使用模型的对数似然对每个可能答案进行评分以进行封闭式评估。我们通过向模型提供任务中的两个纯文本示例（无对应图像）来探索零样本泛化。评估超参数及其他细节见附录B.1.5。

items.en: Our goal is to develop models that can rapidly adapt to diverse and challenging tasks. For this, we consider a wide array of 16 popular multimodal image/video and language benchmarks. In order to validate model design decisions during the course of the project, 5 of these benchmarks were used as part of our development (dev) set: COCO, OKVQA, VQAv2, MSVDQA and VATEX. Performance estimates on the dev benchmarks may be biased, as a result of model selection. We note that this is also the case for prior work which makes use of similar benchmarks to validate and ablate design decisions. To account for this, we report performance on an additional set of 11 benchmarks, spanning captioning, video question-answering, as well as some less commonly explored capabilities such as visual dialogue and multi-choice question-answering tasks. The evaluation benchmarks are described in Appendix B.1.4. We keep all evaluation hyperparameters fixed across all benchmarks. Depending on the task, we use four few-shot prompt templates we describe in more detail in Appendix B.1.5. We emphasize that we do not validate any design decisions on these 11 benchmarks and use them solely to estimate unbiased few-shot learning performance of our models.
items.zh: 我们的目标是开发能够快速适应各种具有挑战性任务的模型。为此，我们考虑了16个流行的多模态图像/视频与语言基准。为在项目过程中验证模型设计决策，其中5个基准被用作我们的开发集：COCO、OKVQA、VQAv2、MSVDQA和VATEX。由于模型选择，开发基准上的性能估计可能存在偏差。我们注意到，先前使用类似基准验证和消融设计决策的工作也存在这种情况。为弥补这一点，我们报告了另外11个基准的性能，涵盖图像描述、视频问答以及一些较少探索的能力，如视觉对话和多选题问答任务。评估基准在附录B.1.4中描述。我们在所有基准上保持所有评估超参数固定。根据任务不同，我们使用四种少样本提示模板，详见附录B.1.5。我们强调，我们没有在这11个基准上验证任何设计决策，仅用于估计模型无偏的少样本学习性能。

items.en: Concretely, estimating few-shot learning performance of a model involves prompting it with a set of support samples and evaluating it on a set of query samples. For the dev benchmarks that are used both to validate design decisions and hyperparameters, as well as to report final performance, we therefore use four subsets: validation support, validation query, test support and test query. For other benchmarks, we need only the latter two. We report in Appendix B.1.4 how we form these subsets.
items.zh: 具体而言，估计模型的少样本学习性能涉及用一组支持样本提示模型，并在查询样本集上评估。对于既用于验证设计决策和超参数、又用于报告最终性能的开发基准，我们因此使用四个子集：验证支持集、验证查询集、测试支持集和测试查询集。对于其他基准，我们只需要后两个。我们在附录B.1.4中报告了如何形成这些子集。

items.en: We report the results of the Flamingo models on few-shot learning in Section 3.1. Section 3.2 gives Flamingo fine-tuned results. An ablation study is given in Section 3.3. Appendix B.2 provides more results including Flamingo’s performance on the ImageNet and Kinetics700 classification tasks, and on our contrastive model’s performance. Appendix C includes additional qualitative results.
items.zh: 我们在第3.1节报告Flamingo模型在少样本学习上的结果。第3.2节给出Flamingo微调后的结果。第3.3节给出消融研究。附录B.2提供更多结果，包括Flamingo在ImageNet和Kinetics700分类任务上的性能，以及对比模型的性能。附录C包含额外的定性结果。

full.secZh: 3.1 视觉-语言任务的少样本学习

items.en: Few-shot results. Results are given in Table 1. Flamingo outperforms by a large margin all previous zero-shot or few-shot methods on the 16 benchmarks considered. This is achieved with as few as four examples per task, demonstrating practical and efficient adaptation of vision models to new tasks. More importantly, Flamingo is often competitive with state-of-the-art methods additionally fine-tuned on up to hundreds of thousands of annotated examples. On six tasks, Flamingo even outperforms the fine-tuned SotA despite using a single set of model weights and only 32 task-specific examples. Finally, despite having only used the dev benchmarks for design decisions, our results generalize well to the other benchmarks, confirming the generality of our approach.
items.zh: 少样本结果。结果见表1。Flamingo在16个基准上大幅优于所有先前的零样本或少样本方法。这仅需每个任务四个示例即可实现，展示了视觉模型对新任务的实际高效适应能力。更重要的是，Flamingo通常与在多达数十万标注样本上额外微调的最先进方法具有竞争力。在六个任务上，尽管使用单一模型权重且仅32个任务特定示例，Flamingo甚至优于微调后的SotA。最后，尽管仅使用开发基准进行设计决策，我们的结果在其他基准上泛化良好，证实了我们方法的通用性。

items.en: Scaling with respect to parameters and shots. As shown in Figure 2, the larger the model, the better the few-shot performance, similar to GPT-3 [11]. The performance also improves with the number of shots. We further find that the largest model better exploits larger numbers of shots. Interestingly, even though our Flamingo models were trained with sequences limited to only 5 images on M3W, they are still able to benefit from up to 32 images or videos during inference. This demonstrates the flexibility of the Flamingo architecture for processing a variable number of videos or images.
items.zh: 参数与样本数量的缩放。如图2所示，模型越大，少样本性能越好，类似于GPT-3 [11]。性能也随样本数量增加而提升。我们进一步发现，最大模型能更好地利用更多样本。有趣的是，尽管我们的Flamingo模型在M3W上训练时序列仅限5张图像，但在推理时仍能受益于多达32张图像或视频。这展示了Flamingo架构处理可变数量视频或图像的灵活性。

full.sec: 3.2 Fine-tuning Flamingo as a pretrained vision-language model
full.secZh: 3.2 微调Flamingo作为预训练视觉-语言模型

items.en: While not the main focus of our work, we verify that when given more data, Flamingo models can be adapted to a task by fine-tuning their weights. In Table 2, we explore fine-tuning our largest model, Flamingo, for a given task with no limit on the annotation budget. In short, we do so by fine-tuning the model on a short schedule with a small learning rate by additionally unfreezing the vision backbone to accommodate a higher input resolution (details in Appendix B.2.2). We find that we can improve results over our previously presented in-context few-shot learning results, setting a new state of the art on five additional tasks: VQAv2, VATEX, VizWiz, MSRVTTQA, and HatefulMemes.
items.zh: 虽然并非我们工作的主要焦点，但我们验证了当提供更多数据时，Flamingo模型可以通过微调其权重来适应任务。在表2中，我们探索在注释预算无限制的情况下，针对给定任务微调我们最大的模型Flamingo。简而言之，我们通过短时间表、小学习率微调模型，并额外解冻视觉骨干以支持更高输入分辨率（详见附录B.2.2）。我们发现，与之前提出的上下文少样本学习结果相比，我们可以改进结果，在另外五个任务上创下新纪录：VQAv2、VATEX、VizWiz、MSRVTTQA和HatefulMemes。

items.en: In Table 3, we report our ablation results using Flamingo-3B on the validation subsets of the five dev benchmarks with 4 shots. Note that we use smaller batch sizes and a shorter training schedule compared to the final models. The Overall score is obtained by dividing each benchmark score by its state-of-the-art (SotA) performance from Table 1 and averaging the results. More details and results are given in Appendix B.3 and Table 10.
items.zh: 在表3中，我们报告了使用Flamingo-3B在五个开发基准的验证子集上、4样本情况下的消融结果。请注意，与最终模型相比，我们使用了更小的批次大小和更短的训练计划。总体得分通过将每个基准得分除以其在表1中的最先进性能并取平均得到。更多细节和结果见附录B.3和表10。

items.en: Importance of the training data mixture. As shown in row (i), getting the right training data plays a crucial role. In fact, removing the interleaved image-text dataset M3W leads to a decrease of more than 17%percent1717\% in performance while removing the conventional paired image-text pairs also decreases performance (by 9.8%percent9.89.8\%), demonstrating the need for different types of datasets. Moreover, removing our paired video-text dataset negatively affects performance on all video tasks. We ablate replacing our image-text pairs (ITP) by the publicly available LAION-400M dataset [96], which leads to a slight degradation in performance. We show in row (ii) the importance of our gradient accumulation strategy compared to using round-robin updates [17].
items.zh: 训练数据混合的重要性。如第(i)行所示，正确的训练数据起着关键作用。事实上，移除交错的图像-文本数据集M3W导致性能下降超过17%，而移除传统的配对图像-文本对也使性能下降9.8%，表明需要不同类型的数据集。此外，移除我们的配对视频-文本数据集对所有视频任务的性能产生负面影响。我们消融了将图像-文本对替换为公开可用的LAION-400M数据集[96]的情况，这导致性能略有下降。第(ii)行显示了我们的梯度累积策略相对于使用轮询更新[17]的重要性。

items.en: Visual conditioning of the frozen LM. We ablate the use of the 0-initialized tanh gating when merging the cross-attention output to the frozen LM output in row (iii). Without it, we see a drop of 4.2%percent4.24.2\% in our overall score. Moreover, we have noticed that disabling the 0-initialized tanh gating leads to training instabilities. Next, we ablate different conditioning architectures in row (iv). vanilla xattn, refers to the vanilla cross-attention from the original Transformer decoder [115]. In the grafting approach from [68], the frozen LM is used as is with no additional layers inserted, and a stack of interleaved self-attention and cross-attention layers that take the frozen LM output are learnt from scratch. Overall, we show that our gated xattn-dense conditioning approach works best.
items.zh: 冻结LM的视觉条件化。在第(iii)行中，我们消融了在将交叉注意力输出合并到冻结LM输出时使用0初始化的tanh门控。没有它，我们的总体得分下降4.2%。此外，我们注意到禁用0初始化的tanh门控会导致训练不稳定。接下来，我们在第(iv)行中消融了不同的条件化架构。vanilla xattn指原始Transformer解码器[115]中的普通交叉注意力。在[68]的嫁接方法中，冻结的LM原样使用，不插入额外层，而是从头学习一组交错的自我注意力和交叉注意力层，这些层接收冻结LM的输出。总体而言，我们表明门控xattn-dense条件化方法效果最佳。

items.en: Compute/Memory vs. performance trade-offs. In row (v), we ablate the frequency at which we add new gated xattn-dense blocks. Although adding them at every layer is better, it significantly increases the number of trainable parameters and time complexity of the model. Notably, inserting them every fourth block accelerates training by 66%percent6666\% while only decreasing the overall score by 1.9%percent1.91.9\%. In light of this trade-off, we maximize the number of added layers under hardware constraints and add a gated xattn-dense every fourth layer for Flamingo-9B and every seventh for Flamingo-80B. We further compare in row (vi) the Perceiver Resampler to a MLP and a vanilla Transformer given a parameter budget. Both underperform the Perceiver Resampler while also being slower.
items.zh: 算力/内存与性能的权衡。在第(v)行中，我们消融了添加新门控xattn-dense块的频率。尽管每层都添加效果更好，但会显著增加可训练参数数量和模型的时间复杂度。值得注意的是，每四层插入一个可将训练速度提升66%，同时总体得分仅下降1.9%。鉴于这种权衡，我们在硬件约束下最大化添加的层数，对于Flamingo-9B每四层添加一个门控xattn-dense，对于Flamingo-80B每七层添加一个。在第(vi)行中，我们在给定参数预算下进一步比较了Perceiver Resampler与MLP和普通Transformer。两者均不如Perceiver Resampler，且速度更慢。

items.en: Vision encoder. In row (vii), we compare our NFNet-F6 vision encoder pretrained with contrastive learning (details in Appendix B.1.3) to the publicly available CLIP ViT-L/14 [85] model trained at 224 resolution. Our NFNet-F6 has a +5.8%percent5.8+5.8\% advantage over the CLIP ViT-L/14 and +8.0%percent8.0+8.0\% over a smaller NFNet-F0 encoder, which highlights the importance of using a strong vision backbone.
items.zh: 视觉编码器。在第(vii)行中，我们将使用对比学习预训练的NFNet-F6视觉编码器（详见附录B.1.3）与公开可用的CLIP ViT-L/14 [85]模型（在224分辨率下训练）进行比较。我们的NFNet-F6比CLIP ViT-L/14有+5.8%的优势，比较小的NFNet-F0编码器有+8.0%的优势，这凸显了使用强大视觉骨干的重要性。

items.en: Freezing LM components prevents catastrophic forgetting. We verify the importance of freezing the LM layers at training in row (viii). If trained from scratch, we observe a large performance decrease of −12.9%percent12.9-12.9\%. Interestingly, fine-tuning our pretrained LM also leads to a drop in performance of −8.0%percent8.0-8.0\%. This indicates an instance of “catastrophic forgetting” [71], in which the model progressively forgets its pretraining while training on a new objective. In our setting, freezing the language model is a better alternative to training with the pre-training dataset (MassiveText) in the mixture.
items.zh: 冻结LM组件可防止灾难性遗忘。我们在第(viii)行中验证了训练时冻结LM层的重要性。如果从头训练，我们观察到性能大幅下降-12.9%。有趣的是，微调我们预训练的LM也导致性能下降-8.0%。这表明存在“灾难性遗忘”[71]的实例，即模型在训练新目标时逐渐忘记其预训练知识。在我们的设置中，冻结语言模型比在混合数据中包含预训练数据集（MassiveText）进行训练更好。

items.en: Language modelling and few-shot adaptation. Language modelling has recently made substantial progress following the introduction of Transformers [115]. The paradigm of first pretraining on a vast amount of data followed by an adaptation on a downstream task has become standard [75, 32, 52, 44, 23, 87, 108, 11]. In this work, we build on the 70B Chinchilla language model [42] as the base LM for Flamingo. Numerous works have explored techniques to adapt language models to novel tasks using a few examples. These include adding small adapter modules [43], fine-tuning a small part of the LM [141], showing in-context examples in the prompt [11], or optimizing the prompt [60, 56] through gradient descent. In this paper, we take inspiration from the in-context [11] few-shot learning technique instead of more involved few-shot learning approaches based on metric learning [24, 117, 103, 112] or meta-learning [27, 7, 155, 91, 31, 6].
items.zh: 语言建模与少样本适应。语言建模最近在引入Transformer [115]后取得了实质性进展。首先在大量数据上预训练，然后在下游任务上适应的范式已成为标准[75, 32, 52, 44, 23, 87, 108, 11]。在这项工作中，我们基于70B Chinchilla语言模型[42]作为Flamingo的基础LM。许多工作探索了使用少量示例将语言模型适应新任务的技术，包括添加小型适配器模块[43]、微调LM的一小部分[141]、在提示中展示上下文示例[11]、或通过梯度下降优化提示[60, 56]。在本文中，我们借鉴了上下文[11]少样本学习技术，而不是基于度量学习[24, 117, 103, 112]或元学习[27, 7, 155, 91, 31, 6]的更复杂的少样本学习方法。

items.en: When language meets vision. These LM breakthroughs have been influential for vision-language modelling. In particular, BERT [23] inspired a large body of vision-language work [66, 106, 16, 38, 121, 61, 109, 151, 118, 59, 29, 28, 142, 143, 101, 107]. We differ from these approaches as Flamingo models do not require fine-tuning on new tasks. Another family of vision-language models is based on contrastive learning [2, 85, 50, 146, 82, 74, 5, 140, 57, 138, 49]. Flamingo differs from contrastive models as it can generate text, although we build and rely upon them for our vision encoder. Similar to our work are VLMs able to generate text in an autoregressive manner [116, 25, 67, 45, 19]. Concurrent works [124, 17, 119, 154, 58] also propose to formulate numerous vision tasks as text generation problems. Building on top of powerful pretrained language models has been explored in several recent works. One recent line of work [114, 26, 78, 68, 136, 144] proposes to freeze the pretrained LM weights to prevent catastrophic forgetting [71]. We follow this idea by freezing the Chinchilla LM layers [42] and adding learnable layers within the frozen LM. We differ from prior work by introducing the first LM that can ingest arbitrarily interleaved images, videos, and text.
items.zh: 语言与视觉相遇。这些LM的突破对视觉-语言建模产生了影响。特别是，BERT [23]启发了大量的视觉-语言工作[66, 106, 16, 38, 121, 61, 109, 151, 118, 59, 29, 28, 142, 143, 101, 107]。我们与这些方法不同，因为Flamingo模型不需要在新任务上进行微调。另一类视觉-语言模型基于对比学习[2, 85, 50, 146, 82, 74, 5, 140, 57, 138, 49]。Flamingo与对比模型不同，因为它可以生成文本，尽管我们构建并依赖它们作为视觉编码器。与我们的工作类似的是能够以自回归方式生成文本的VLM [116, 25, 67, 45, 19]。并行的工作[124, 17, 119, 154, 58]也提出将众多视觉任务表述为文本生成问题。在强大的预训练语言模型基础上构建已在最近的几项工作中得到探索。最近的一系列工作[114, 26, 78, 68, 136, 144]提出冻结预训练LM权重以防止灾难性遗忘[71]。我们遵循这一思路，冻结Chinchilla LM层[42]，并在冻结的LM内添加可学习层。我们与先前工作的不同之处在于引入了第一个能够处理任意交错图像、视频和文本的LM。

items.en: Web-scale vision and language training datasets. Manually annotated vision and language datasets are costly to obtain and thus relatively small (10k-100k) in scale [139, 15, 3, 69, 122, 129]. To alleviate this lack of data, numerous works [50, 98, 14, 110] automatically scrape readily available paired vision-text data. In addition to such paired data, we show the importance of also training on entire multimodal webpages containing interleaved images and text as a single sequence. Concurrent work CM3 [1] proposes to generate HTML markup from pages, while we simplify the text prediction task by only generating plain text. We emphasize few-shot learning and vision tasks while CM3 [1] primarily evaluates on language-only benchmarks in a zero-shot or fine-tuned setup.
items.zh: 网络规模的视觉与语言训练数据集。手动标注的视觉与语言数据集获取成本高昂，因此规模相对较小（10k-100k）[139, 15, 3, 69, 122, 129]。为缓解数据不足，许多工作[50, 98, 14, 110]自动抓取现成的配对视觉-文本数据。除了此类配对数据，我们还展示了在包含交错图像和文本的整个多模态网页上作为单一序列进行训练的重要性。并行工作CM3 [1]提出从页面生成HTML标记，而我们通过仅生成纯文本来简化文本预测任务。我们强调少样本学习和视觉任务，而CM3 [1]主要在零样本或微调设置下评估纯语言基准。

items.en: Limitations. First, our models build on pretrained LMs, and as a side effect, directly inherit their weaknesses. For example, LM priors are generally helpful, but may play a role in occasional hallucinations and ungrounded guesses. Furthermore, LMs generalise poorly to sequences longer than the training ones. They also suffer from poor sample efficiency during training. Addressing these issues can accelerate progress in the field and enhance the abilities of VLMs like Flamingo.
items.zh: 局限性。首先，我们的模型建立在预训练LM之上，因此直接继承了它们的弱点。例如，LM先验通常有帮助，但可能在偶尔的幻觉和无根据的猜测中起作用。此外，LM对长于训练序列的序列泛化能力较差。它们在训练期间也存在样本效率低下的问题。解决这些问题可以加速该领域的进展，并增强像Flamingo这样的VLM的能力。

items.en: Second, the classification performance of Flamingo lags behind that of state-of-the-art contrastive models [85, 82]. These models directly optimize for text-image retrieval, of which classification is a special case. In contrast, our models handle a wider range of tasks, such as open-ended ones. A unified approach to achieve the best of both worlds is an important research direction.
items.zh: 其次，Flamingo 的分类性能落后于最先进的对比模型 [85, 82]。这些模型直接优化文本-图像检索，而分类是其特例。相比之下，我们的模型处理更广泛的任务，例如开放式任务。实现两者最佳性能的统一方法是一个重要的研究方向。

items.en: Third, in-context learning has significant advantages over gradient-based few-shot learning methods, but also suffers from drawbacks depending on the characteristics of the application at hand. We demonstrate the effectiveness of in-context learning when access is limited to only a few dozen examples. In-context learning also enables simple deployment, requiring only inference, generally with no hyperparameter tuning needed. However, in-context learning is known to be highly sensitive to various aspects of the demonstrations [148, 80], and its inference compute cost and absolute performance scale poorly with the number of shots beyond this low-data regime. There may be opportunities to combine few-shot learning methods to leverage their complementary benefits. We discuss the limitations of our work in more depth in Appendix D.1.
items.zh: 第三，上下文学习相比基于梯度的少样本学习方法具有显著优势，但也存在取决于应用特性的缺点。我们证明了在仅能访问几十个样本时上下文学习的有效性。上下文学习还支持简单部署，仅需推理，通常无需超参数调整。然而，上下文学习对演示的各个方面高度敏感 [148, 80]，且其推理计算成本和绝对性能在低数据区域之外随样本数量增加而扩展性差。可能存在结合少样本学习方法以利用其互补优势的机会。我们在附录 D.1 中更深入地讨论了工作的局限性。

items.en: Societal impacts. In terms of societal impacts, Flamingo offers a number of benefits while carrying some risks. Its ability to rapidly adapt to a broad range of tasks have the potential to enable non-expert users to obtain good performance in data-starved regimes, lowering the barriers to both beneficial and malicious applications. Flamingo is exposed to the same risks as large language models, such as outputting offensive language, propagating social biases and stereotypes, as well as leaking private information [126, 42]. Its ability to additionally handle visual inputs poses specific risks such as gender and racial biases relating to the contents of the input images, similar to a number of visual recognition systems [37, 147, 12, 21, 97]. We refer the reader to Appendix D.2 for a more extensive discussion of the societal impacts of our work, both positive and negative; as well as mitigation strategies and early investigations of risks relating to racial or gender bias and toxic outputs. Finally we note that, following prior work focusing on language models [111, 81, 72], the few-shot capabilities of Flamingo could be useful for mitigating such risks.
items.zh: 社会影响。在社会影响方面，Flamingo 提供了一些好处，同时也带来了一些风险。其快速适应广泛任务的能力可能使非专家用户在数据匮乏的情况下获得良好性能，从而降低了有益和恶意应用的门槛。Flamingo 面临与大语言模型相同的风险，例如输出冒犯性语言、传播社会偏见和刻板印象，以及泄露隐私信息 [126, 42]。其额外处理视觉输入的能力带来了特定风险，例如与输入图像内容相关的性别和种族偏见，类似于许多视觉识别系统 [37, 147, 12, 21, 97]。我们请读者参考附录 D.2，其中更广泛地讨论了工作的社会影响（包括正面和负面），以及缓解策略和对种族或性别偏见及有毒输出风险的初步研究。最后，我们注意到，遵循先前关注语言模型的工作 [111, 81, 72]，Flamingo 的少样本能力可能有助于缓解此类风险。

items.en: Conclusion. We proposed Flamingo, a general-purpose family of models that can be applied to image and video tasks with minimal task-specific training data. We also qualitatively explored interactive abilities of Flamingo such as “chatting” with the model, demonstrating flexibility beyond traditional vision benchmarks. Our results suggest that connecting pre-trained large language models with powerful visual models is an important step towards general-purpose visual understanding.
items.zh: 结论。我们提出了 Flamingo，一个通用模型系列，可应用于图像和视频任务，且只需极少的任务特定训练数据。我们还定性地探索了 Flamingo 的交互能力，例如与模型“聊天”，展示了超越传统视觉基准的灵活性。我们的结果表明，连接预训练的大语言模型与强大的视觉模型是迈向通用视觉理解的重要一步。

items.en: This research was funded by DeepMind. We would like to thank many colleagues for useful discussions, suggestions, feedback, and advice, including: Samuel Albanie, Relja Arandjelović, Kareem Ayoub, Lorrayne Bennett, Adria Recasens Continente, Tom Eccles, Nando de Freitas, Sander Dieleman, Conor Durkan, Aleksa Gordić, Raia Hadsell, Will Hawkins, Lisa Anne Hendricks, Felix Hill, Jordan Hoffmann, Geoffrey Irving, Drew Jaegle, Koray Kavukcuoglu, Agustin Dal Lago, Mateusz Malinowski, Soňa Mokrá, Gaby Pearl, Toby Pohlen, Jack Rae, Laurent Sifre, Francis Song, Maria Tsimpoukelli, Gregory Wayne, and Boxi Wu.
items.zh: 本研究由 DeepMind 资助。我们要感谢许多同事的有益讨论、建议、反馈和意见，包括：Samuel Albanie、Relja Arandjelović、Kareem Ayoub、Lorrayne Bennett、Adria Recasens Continente、Tom Eccles、Nando de Freitas、Sander Dieleman、Conor Durkan、Aleksa Gordić、Raia Hadsell、Will Hawkins、Lisa Anne Hendricks、Felix Hill、Jordan Hoffmann、Geoffrey Irving、Drew Jaegle、Koray Kavukcuoglu、Agustin Dal Lago、Mateusz Malinowski、Soňa Mokrá、Gaby Pearl、Toby Pohlen、Jack Rae、Laurent Sifre、Francis Song、Maria Tsimpoukelli、Gregory Wayne 和 Boxi Wu。
